ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., development, production, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance metrics belong to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the performance metrics belong to */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the model */,
  "rmse" REAL /* RMSE of the model */,
  "penalty" REAL /* Penalty of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* KAPPA of the model */,
  "rho" REAL /* RHO of the model */,
  "v0" REAL /* V0 of the model */,
  "vbar" REAL /* VBAR of the model */,
  "xi" REAL /* XI of the model */,
  "lambda" REAL /* LAMBDA of the model */,
  "mu_y" REAL /* MU_Y of the model */,
  "sigma_y" REAL /* SIGMA_Y of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was evaluated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., %, MSE) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the metric */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom metric the value belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the value belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the custom metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric value was evaluated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
